api_key.description: noCRM API key, sent as the X-API-KEY header. Never logged.

base_url.description: noCRM API base URL. Override with your account's subdomain base URL, e.g. https://yourcompany.nocrm.io/api/v2.

step_id.description: Step id for the step detail stream.

client_id.description: Client folder id for the client_folder detail stream.

lead_id.description: Lead id for lead detail and lead subresource streams.

attachment_id.description: Lead attachment id for the lead_attachment detail stream.

prospecting_list_id.description: Prospecting list/spreadsheet id for current prospecting-list detail and prospect streams.

user_id.description: User id for the user detail stream.

team_id.description: Team id for the team detail stream.

webhook_event_id.description: Webhook event id for the webhook_event detail stream.
